name: amadeus-claude-code-dev

scripts.lint: bunx @biomejs/biome check tests/ packages/setup/ packages/framework/core/ scripts/
scripts.lint:check: bunx @biomejs/biome check tests/ packages/setup/ packages/framework/core/ scripts/
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint

description: Dev-only tooling for the AIDLC framework — not part of the distributable. The shipped framework lives under dist/<harness>/ and is installed into user projects with `npx @amadeus-dlc/setup install` (see README.md). All framework hooks and tools run via bun without requiring this package; bun-types here only powers contributor LSP coverage.
